mapper.sql: br.id, br.created_time, br.created_timestamp, br.created_by, br.modified_time, br.modified_timestamp, br.modified_by, br.version, br.status, br.code, br.name, br.default_flag, br.build_in_flag

br.id, br.created_time, br.created_timestamp, br.created_by, br.created_id, br.modified_time, br.modified_timestamp, br.modified_by, br.modified_id, br.deleted, br.version, br.remark, br.status, br.code, br.name, br.seq, br.default_flag, br.build_in_flag, br.org_id

select
, 1 as checked from `role` br inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_role bur on br.id = bur.role_id and bur.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bur.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bu.id = #{userId} order by br.name asc, br.seq asc

select
, 1 as checked from `role` br inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_group_role bugr on br.id = bugr.role_id and bugr.deleted = 0 inner join user_group bug on bugr.user_group_id = bug.id and bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 inner join user_group_user bugu on bug.id = bugu.user_group_id and bugu.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bugu.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bu.id = #{userId} order by br.name asc, br.seq asc
mapper.select:
select
, 0 as checked from `role` br inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} order by br.name asc, br.seq asc

select
, 1 as checked from `role` br inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_group_role bugr on br.id = bugr.role_id and bugr.deleted = 0 inner join user_group bug on bugr.user_group_id = bug.id and bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 where br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bug.id = #{userGroupId} order by br.name asc, br.seq asc
